title: Gift Wrap Pack 4 x 2 Metre Rolls, 2 Metre Raffia, 8 Tags Present Christmas Wrapping Paper Set - Xmas Festive Holiday Green Gold White Mistletoe Christmas Tree
features: Each 8 metre wrap pack includes four 2m rolls of plastic-free paper, two raffia ribbons, and 8 matching tags, giving you everything needed to wrap, tie, and personalise festive gifts.
Choose from four beautiful design themes: traditional red and gold, frosty silver and white, rustic woodland green and gold, or cheerful red with candy cane motifs.
Made from durable, eco-friendly paper, these wrap packs offer a sustainable option that reduces plastic waste while ensuring your parcels look polished and stylish.
Raffia ribbons add a natural finishing touch, while the included tags make it quick and simple to personalise each gift with names or festive messages.
Ideal for families, friends, and colleagues, these coordinated sets bring variety, charm, and sophistication, ensuring every present stands out beautifully under the tree.
description: Product Description Complete Your Gifts in Festive Style Wrap your presents beautifully with these Christmas wrap packs, featuring a mix of seasonal paper, twine, and tags. Each set includes coordinated designs to make every gift look special under the tree. Durable, easy to use, and full of festive charm, they’re perfect for holiday celebrations. Festive Gift Wrap Packs for Every Style Bright & Playful Wrapping Add a cheerful touch to your presents with this red and white gift wrap pack. Complete with paper, tags, and twine, it’s perfect for creating fun, festive parcels that stand out under the Christmas tree. Elegant Silver Wrapping Bring a touch of sophistication to your gifting with this silver and white wrap pack. Featuring coordinated paper, tags, and ribbon, it creates beautifully finished parcels with timeless festive style. Beautiful Gift Wrap Packs for Every Occasion Classic Green & Gold Wrapping Elevate your gift presentation with this green and gold wrap pack. Featuring paper, tags, and twine in rich festive shades, it creates a luxurious look that’s perfect for stylish Christmas gifting. Traditional Red & Gold Wrapping Bring timeless festive charm with this red and gold wrap pack. Complete with coordinated paper, tags, and twine, it’s the ideal way to make your presents shine under the tree.
